title: Adda247 is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Adda247 is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Adda247 invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Adda247:
Adda247 is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247!
